summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SSNC Speed Networking PWA. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Admin panel fully functional. User registration form working. Some integration issues found with user/volunteer login and live screen UI.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button not found after entering password

integration_issues.issue: User login returns 400 error - likely credential mismatch or user doesn't exist
Volunteer login returns 400 error - credential mismatch between backend test and frontend test
Shows 'Profile not found' for invalid user ID - expected behavior but needs valid user ID for testing

passed_tests: Admin navigation (Events, Categories, Users, Volunteers, Settings)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix user/volunteer login integration issues - ensure frontend uses correct credentials that match backend. Fix live screen password form submit button. Test with valid user IDs for public profile functionality.
